title: Raccoon Removal in Crown Heights, Brooklyn | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Crown Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Crown Heights residents facing raccoon problems need fast, professional wildlife removal services they can trust. Our experienced team provides comprehensive raccoon removal throughout Crown Heights, from the brownstones along Eastern Parkway to the historic row houses near Prospect Place. We offer humane, effective solutions with pricing ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of your infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Crown Heights wildlife management with same-day emergency service and licensed technicians who understand the unique architectural challenges of Brooklyn's classic buildings. Our humane removal methods protect both your property and local wildlife while ensuring raccoons don't return.
localContext: Crown Heights' beautiful pre-war apartments, Victorian homes, and tree-lined streets near the Brooklyn Botanic Garden create ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. The neighborhood's proximity to Prospect Park and abundance of mature trees make raccoon encounters increasingly common for residents between Franklin Avenue and Utica Avenue.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Crown Heights?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Crown Heights typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on factors like the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of damage, and whether babies are present. Simple single-raccoon removals start around $900, while complex infestations requiring extensive repairs and multiple visits can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Crown Heights, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Crown Heights due to its proximity to Prospect Park, mature tree coverage, and older buildings with accessible entry points. Raccoons are attracted to the area's residential garbage, pet food, and the shelter provided by attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in brownstones and apartment buildings throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Crown Heights home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Crown Heights residents with urgent raccoon problems. Most removals begin within 24 hours of your call. Simple cases can be resolved in one visit, while more complex situations involving babies or multiple raccoons may require 3-7 days for complete, humane removal and exclusion work.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in Crown Heights?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We exclusively use humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Our technicians are trained in ethical wildlife control, ensuring raccoons are safely relocated and that mothers aren't separated from their young. We also provide full exclusion services to prevent future entries without harming animals.
